title: HOMESHOPA 12" Wooden Broom Head Stiff PVC Bristle Brush, Replacement Wooden Broom Head, Indoor Outdoor Stiff Bristle Floor Sweeping Brush with Plastic Fixing Bracket Connector
features: Your Ultimate Cleaning Partner: Our heavy duty broom is a game-changer in the world of cleaning. Engineered with innovation and durability in mind, this outdoor broom is here to revolutionize your cleaning routine. With its sturdy PVC bristles and durable construction, it effortlessly tackles dirt and debris on any surface, from indoor floors to outdoor patios. Say goodbye to flimsy brooms that barely get the job done and hello to a cleaner, happier home with our Stiff PVC Bristle Broom.

12” Hard Brush: Our sweeping brooms use high-quality PVC material for the bristles, ensuring they maintain their shape and effectiveness even after prolonged use. They are durable and resistant to wear, allowing the broom to withstand regular use and rough surfaces. PVC bristles also provide effective sweeping action, efficiently capturing dust, dirt, and debris.

Replacement Wooden Head: 12" 290mm wide wooden broom head, complete with a robust coloured plastic bracket slot designed specifically for a 23.5mm radius pole handle stick. This innovative design features a convenient connector bracket for effortless attachment to your broom handle, ensuring easy installation and secure fastening.

Long-lasting Performance: Invest in quality that lasts. Our stiff PVC bristles brush heads are built to withstand years of heavy-duty use, ensuring your broom remains a reliable cleaning companion for years to come. Say goodbye to frequent replacements and hello to long-lasting cleaning power.

Versatile Usage: Our indoor and outdoor cleaning broom effortlessly tackles various floor surfaces, including wood, linoleum, tile, concrete, and cement. From home and kitchen use to outdoor areas like patios, sidewalks, and driveways, as well as industrial settings such as shops, garages, porches, and warehouses, our broom is a reliable choice. The PVC bristles excel at sweeping and cleaning tasks, making them suitable for both indoor and outdoor environments.
